raw:
{
  "judge_id": "ASR_Judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta could be improved.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing or wrong citation.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the most recent confidence-aware ASR model of Hannun et al. (2014) is not the most recent).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the tool-use motivation is asserted but not connected).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta could be improved.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the most recent confidence-aware ASR model of Hannun et al. (2014) is not the most recent).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the tool-use motivation is asserted but not connected).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
